name: fairyteller_full_text
description: Generates chapters 2-5 after the first chapter preview and writes full-text.json for later visuals/rendering.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { artifacts: { fullText: { status: "ready", url: "/api/fairyteller/jobs/" + $("Normalize Full Text").item.json.jobId + "/artifacts/full-text.json", chapterCount: $("Normalize Full Text").item.json.fullText.chapterCount } } } }}
